category_sources: Official OptiPNG homepage describes recompressing PNG files to smaller size without losing information.
source_facts.description says OptiPNG is a PNG file optimizer.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use the OptiPNG/optiPNG project name.
docs_sources: Official OptiPNG homepage links a user manual for version 7.9.1.
source_facts.homepage is the official OptiPNG project site.
repo_sources: Official OptiPNG homepage provides source archives and SourceForge contribution links, but no official source-control repository URL was confirmed.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was investigated.
tags_sources: Official OptiPNG homepage says it recompresses PNG files losslessly and offers a command manual.
